Function.Inference: Introductory section building energy, ending with a double barline before the loop.
Main looping body containing several thematic sections, returning to the Segno via D.S.

Section.Inference: Introductory section building energy and establishing the rhythmic drive.
First iteration of the main theme in D minor.
Repeat of the main theme an octave higher with thicker instrumentation.
New contrasting section featuring a soaring lyrical melody.
Modulation to G dorian, introducing a triumphant new musical idea.
The previous triumphant theme is transposed up a whole step to A dorian.
Short non-thematic transition used to smoothly loop back to the Segno.
